description_long: This is a pair of locking pliers, commonly known as Vise-Grips, featuring a robust metallic body with a matte black finish and a distinctive yellow-tipped handle. The tool has a long, slightly curved handle for increased leverage and a knurled adjustment screw at the end for setting the jaw width and clamping force. The jaws are flat and broad, designed for gripping and holding objects securely, with a visible pivot mechanism that allows the jaws to lock in place. The handles appear to be partially coated or tipped with a yellow material, likely for improved grip and visibility. The overall construction suggests durability and strength, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban environments such as garages or workshops. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sturdy pair of locking pliers with a matte black body, yellow-tipped handle, and adjustable knurled screw. The jaws are flat and designed for secure gripping.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pliers, highlighting the curved handle, adjustment screw, and yellow-tipped grip.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the width of the jaws, the alignment of the handles, and the prominent adjustment screw.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the flat jaws, the length of the tool, and the yellow handle tip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the handles, the adjustment screw, and the overall thickness of the tool.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, partially insulated handles with a yellow plastic tip for ergonomic grip.
attribute_jaw_design: Flat, broad jaws with a locking mechanism, suitable for gripping and holding objects securely; no serrations or wire cutter visible.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed pivot with a locking mechanism and an adjustable knurled screw for jaw width and clamping force.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth metallic surface with a plastic-coated tip for improved grip.
